summary: Wire production Command, Query, Preview, and Submit roundtrips to Worker authority
acceptance_criteria: Every normal Web M3-M7 action uses the production Worker Boot, Query, Preview, and Submit contract; no command handler may discard a command, update only local React state, or fabricate success.
Player and AI actions use the same serializable GameCommand schemas and authoritative submission path.
Preview returns authoritative cost, eligibility, expiry/revision, and bounded reason data without mutating WorldState.
A valid Submit produces an accepted Worker result and an authoritative state-hash transition; UI success state is driven only by that accepted response and associated revision.
Invalid, stale, expired, duplicate, or unauthorized commands are rejected with stable reason codes, do not change the state hash, and drive visible rejected UI state.
Out-of-order responses, superseded previews, reconnect generations, and repeated user input cannot acknowledge the wrong action or apply a result twice.
The shell exposes integration seams for read-model, time-control, and save modules without importing sim-core or retaining WorldState in client state.
notes: Worker and protocol foundations are owned by RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 and must not be reopened here without a routed scope change.
Fixture snapshots may remain test inputs but cannot be the normal product success path.
